ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card */,
  "card_name" TEXT /* Name of the card */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of the card (e.g., reward, strategy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the card */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the card (e.g., common, rare, epic) */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost of the card */,
  "attack" INTEGER /* Attack value of the card */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health value of the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card associated with the reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Number of times the reward is offered */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., card, gold, experience) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_rewards_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card associated with the analytics data */,
  "mean_model_score_change" REAL /* Mean model score change when the card is removed */,
  "skip_onweer_count" INTEGER /* Number of times removing the card causes the model to skip Onweer+1 */,
  "take_onweer_count" INTEGER /* Number of times removing the card causes the model to take Onweer+1 */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the card in different game formats */,
  "game_format" TEXT /* Game format (e.g., constructed, casual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_analytics_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, game developer, researcher) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Type of data requested (e.g., analytics, rewards) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deck_compositions" (
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deck */,
  "deck_name" TEXT /* Name of the deck */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card in the deck */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the card in the deck */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deck_id", "card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deck used in the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "opponent_deck_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent's deck */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_deck_id FOREIGN KEY ("deck_id") REFERENCES deck_compositions ("deck_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the card involved in the interaction */,
  "interacting_card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interacting card */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., synergy, counter) */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_interactions_interacting_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("interacting_card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_interactions_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., cards, rewards, analytics) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
